name: HWR_WLNS_ELIG_PROFILE
description: This table stores eligibility profile details for wellness objects like goal, task, etc.

columns.Name: WLNS_ELIG_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Id identifying the entry in this table.

columns.Name: WLNS_OBJ_TYPE
columns.Comments: This enum is the type of wellness object created on profile, like GOAL, CONTEST, TASK, etc.

columns.Name: WLNS_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: This is the id of wellness object which can be used to map to goal and competition table.

columns.Name: ELIG_PRFL_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the Eligibility Profile name which the entity is created.

columns.Name: ELIG_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Eligibility Profile ID which the entity is created.

columns.Name: ELIG_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Eligibility Object ID for which profiles are attached. This is generated from eligibility objects table.

columns.Name: ELIG_ESS_JOB_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: This is the Eligibility ESS job Request ID for which the eligibility object profiles need to be evaluated.

columns.Name: IS_PRFL_RESULT_AVAILABLE
columns.Comments: This determines if the Eligibility ESS evaluation job is completed and Eligibility profiles result is available.

columns.Name: LAST_PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: This determines the last trigerred time of Evaluate Eligibility ESS for this wlns_obj_id.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
